---
title: 'Handmade Bags: The Pineapple Bag'
date: '2017-11-28T06:32:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Creatively Unique Arts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8563541915430645840'
blogger_filename: '/2017/11/handmade-bags-pineapple-bag.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatively Unique Arts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Bags'
---

The Pineapple Bag. It has a front pocket with a flap, back pocket with no flap, and two inside pockets, with a zipper top.<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144541625-bbaca24ee2a4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144541625-e8e3b807e0dc.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144552855-de65b08554db.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144552855-3c1b8a7e3118.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144619765-6c796d2498ca.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144619765-4fdea06289c7.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144627706-343a977e87b7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144627706-edcdd63f334f.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pineapple-bag-b410b53712f0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pineapple-bag-3dfe3520a43c.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
